textByHash.0e900d937aa46fa4092432daf3c071f0c642baa2: There are no monsters more powerful than us!
textByHash.67bf6cf8201cf723538f59806876a9d67ad47faa: You got lucky! I'll get you next time!
textByHash.7c45025084bd86cf73a4c4cfb7151c11f0e9ce2e: Puny human! You're not a fearsome monster!
textByHash.a25fc924ebb5bdbde8303522b0ec109ee0f22d59: No insect could be tougher than us! We're the best!
textByHash.b47a084a56b2058730e58689c9b0629d3d0024ba: What? Oh, ah, no, of course he didn't. We're actually an artificial likeness of the King Black Dragon. No one could really kill the King Black Dragon!
textByHash.c490dad057606d8047ec92e5d586880143935178: What? Oh, ah, no, of course she didn't. We're actually an artificial likeness of the King Black Dragon. No one could really kill the King Black Dragon!
textByHash.f6a4f9050f4b0055737f11fb3b9ca8966268a814: Just a minute. What if it's something bad?
